meaning: n.急板之乐曲或乐章adj.极快的,迅速的
examples: You just press the button and, hey presto, a perfect cup of coffee!
The movie is preceded by "Presto Chango, " a new Pixar short about a disagreement over a carrot between a magician and his rabbit.
But hey, presto, now you are!
All it takes is the right publicist to conjure the media fairy, and presto!
But presto, Bob is sliding in beside her without so much as a may-I-join-you.
